reference: FOR ONE DAY WHEN BRYNHILD AND GUDRUN WERE BATHING BRYNHILD WADED FARTHEST OUT INTO THE RIVER AND SAID SHE DID THAT TO SHOW SHE WAS GUIRUN'S SUPERIOR
text: For one day, when Brunhild and Gundrun were bathing, Brunhild waited farther south into the river, and said she did that to show she was Gundrun's superior.
